hall_of_fame.title: PEP 703 -- Making the Global Interpreter Lock Optional in CPython
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: The optional GIL will enable true parallelism in CPU-bound threads, significantly enhancing performance in multithreaded Python applications.

hall_of_fame.title: React Fire: Modernizing React DOM
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: React Fire succeeds now due to advancements in React, TypeScript, and web development, enabling a more maintainable and efficient implementation.

hall_of_fame.title: Add upcoming GPT-3 model
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: GPT-3's massive success and widespread adoption make its integration crucial for the Transformers library.

last_resurrection.title: Add basic authentication generator
last_resurrection.one_line_why: A basic authentication generator succeeds now because Rails 7 provides a solid foundation and modern authentication standards are increasingly adopted.
